title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at JSW Steel

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at JSW Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
